meaning: adj.神经系统的,神经中枢的,背的
examples: Neural networks are computer systems which mimic the workings of the brain.
The neural activity of the brain will become intensified.
Their research thus implies a different character model, which is supposed to manipulate the neural networks inside.
In the neural taste test of 40 subjects, Montague found that kind of response less powerful with Coke.
If Mischel and his team succeed, they will have outlined the neural circuitry of self-control.
